title: Browse page loads with 'Romance' genre filter
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Verify that the 'Romance' genre filter is applied. | Check that the content list displays TV shows filtered by the 'Romance' genre.
expected_result: The 'Romance' genre filter is applied. | The content list displays TV shows filtered by the 'Romance' genre.

title: Navigating between tabs
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Select the 'Top Rated' tab. | Select the 'Recently Added' tab.
expected_result: The 'Top Rated' tab is selected. | The 'Recently Added' tab is selected.

title: Clearing the genre filter
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Click on the 'Romance' genre filter button. | Verify that the genre filter is cleared.

title: Content list interaction
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Select a TV show from the content list. | Verify that the selected TV show's details are displayed.
expected_result: The selected TV show's details are displayed.

title: Negative flow: Invalid genre selection
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Click on the 'Romance' genre filter button. | Enter an invalid genre name (e.g., 'Fantasy123'). | Verify that the genre filter is not applied.
expected_result: The genre filter is not applied.

title: Boundary validation: Empty genre filter
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Click on the 'Romance' genre filter button. | Clear the genre filter. | Verify that the content list displays all TV shows.
expected_result: The content list displays all TV shows.

title: Toggle state of genre filter
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Click on the 'Romance' genre filter button. | Click on the 'Romance' genre filter button again. | Verify that the toggle state of the genre filter changes.
expected_result: The toggle state of the genre filter changes.

title: Accessibility/usability: Keyboard navigation
test_steps: Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Browse' page. | Use keyboard navigation to select the 'Romance' genre filter button. | Verify that the genre filter is applied.
